# RikaiDev（理解）

> Human vision. AI execution. Real products. RikaiDev is an open-source
> organization building developer tools where humans provide insight and
> judgment, and AI provides execution and scale — together shipping what one
> person couldn't build alone. Every product is MIT-licensed, local-first,
> privacy-first, and built in public. "The code is the proof."

RikaiDev's naming system uses Japanese wago (和語) words carried by kanji, where
the word's literal meaning maps directly to what the tool does, and the subject
is always a human act of perception or care — never the machine. The visual mark
is the I Ching trigram Li (離卦, fire/clarity), whose yang/yin lines double as
binary (0/1) and as human-judgment / AI-iteration; the top line is vermilion (朱)
and blinks like a terminal cursor.

## Pages
- [Landing](https://rikaidev.github.io/): overview, products, why open source.
- [Brand System](https://rikaidev.github.io/brand/): full CIS — logo, color, typography, naming laws, voice & tone, applications.

## Products (all MIT, open source)
- [yomi (読み)](https://github.com/RikaiDev/yomi): read/write LINE from any AI agent; local MCP server with E2EE local decryption. Reads not just messages but context.
- [toki (時)](https://github.com/RikaiDev/toki): automatic developer time tracking — no timer to press; infers context from IDE and git.
- [mesen (目線)](https://github.com/RikaiDev/mesen): UX behavior testing through simulated user viewpoints ("see your UI with someone else's eyes"), persona-driven.
- [kaido (海道)](https://github.com/RikaiDev/kaido): terminal AI Ops coach — diagnoses while teaching *why*, not just *how*. Local LLM, offline-capable.
- [mimamori (見守り)](https://github.com/RikaiDev/mimamori): Discord bot that guards team communication tone — gentle watching, not surveillance.
- [minori (実り)](https://github.com/RikaiDev/minori): AI agriculture collaboration — voice field logs, harvest prediction, connecting farmers and buyers over LINE.

## Concept layer
- AII (AI Interactive): the manifesto/philosophy layer — "interfaces should understand people, not force people to learn interfaces." Not a product; uses an acronym rather than a wago name.
- cortex: an early English-named forerunner, now archived. Predates the naming laws.

## Brand facts
- Colors: 紙 washi #F2EEE5 (paper), 墨 sumi #1F1C17 (ink), 朱 shu #B23A28 (the single accent).
- Type: Noto Serif TC (display), Zen Old Mincho (Japanese names), Noto Sans TC (body), JetBrains Mono (code/CLI).
- Voice: honest (silence over fabricated success), coaching (why over what), building in public, restraint (less but better).

## Links
- GitHub org: https://github.com/RikaiDev
- License: MIT
